approval_options.pending: Decision is still open; launcher execution stays blocked.
approval_options.approved: Requires exact command plan hash, commands, budget, logs, rollback and validation approval.
approval_options.deferred: Keeps launcher execution blocked for later review.
approval_options.rejected: Refuses this launcher execution request while preserving evidence.

invariants: This file is a human-fillable launcher execution decision, not execution.
Generated decisions start as pending and execute=false.
Agents must not approve launcher execution on behalf of humans.
Remote writes, production and secrets remain blocked unless separately approved.
